summary: Baseline audit: strategy markdown exists, but real Roblox first-party data has not yet been captured into committed aggregate artifacts.

current_findings.finding: Polaxory has a clear mission/thesis and command-room direction.
current_findings.decision_impact: Useful for alignment, not sufficient for gameplay iteration.

current_findings.finding: The round-completion reward loop is the first measurable retention loop.
current_findings.decision_impact: Should be instrumented first so we can prove or disprove it.

current_findings.finding: No committed aggregate first-party Roblox telemetry snapshot is present in the baseline audit.
current_findings.decision_impact: Build telemetry before adding more markdown strategy.
